critical.description: Immediate action required. Blocks release, compilation, or introduces severe security/architectural flaws.

high.description: Significant issue that should be addressed before release. High impact on maintainability, performance, or security.

medium.description: Violation of standard practices or policies. Should be addressed but does not immediately block progress.

low.description: Minor issue. Does not significantly impact the system but violates conventions.

informational.description: FYI. Observations or generated configurations that don't represent a violation.
